items.title: End-to-end cleaning and transformation pipeline
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  load["load data"] --> pandasClean["pandas: dedupe, dtypes, trim"]
  pandasClean --> split["train / test split"]
  split --> fitPipe["Pipeline.fit on train"]
  fitPipe --> impute["impute"]
  impute --> encode["encode categoricals"]
  encode --> scale["scale numerics"]
  scale --> model["estimator"]
  split --> score["Pipeline.predict on test"]
  score --> impute
  fitPipe --> persist["joblib artifact"]
items.caption: Stateless pandas cleaning often precedes the split; all learnable transforms fit on training rows inside one Pipeline.

items.title: ColumnTransformer branches
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  input["DataFrame X"]
  input --> numBranch["numeric branch"]
  input --> catBranch["categorical branch"]
  numBranch --> numImp["SimpleImputer"]
  numImp --> numScale["StandardScaler"]
  catBranch --> catImp["SimpleImputer"]
  catImp --> ohe["OneHotEncoder"]
  numScale --> concat["hstack features"]
  ohe --> concat
  concat --> estimator["classifier"]
items.caption: Each column subset runs its own mini-pipeline; outputs concatenate before the final estimator.
